steps.t: Hadorion has asked you to pick up the trail of a suspicious figure spotted leaving Barad Faen at night. The trail should follow the western road.

Hadorion has asked you to pick up the trail of a suspicious figure spotted leaving Barad Faen at night. The trail should follow the western road.
The trail has led you to an abandoned makeshift camp-site. Search for evidence of use.
The interloper dropped a strange looking cloth that should be identifiable. You should report to Hadorion. Hadorion can be found in his home in Barad …
